'''Ferro-worms''' were sightless [[Snake/Legends|snakes]] that made their nests inside of buildings. These worms could be found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and were often preyed upon by [[spire falcon]]s.

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
